100% Open Source · Zero License Fees

Open Source ERP Partner for Thai Business

We help Thai organisations cut ERP costs by up to 80% using Odoo and ERPNext — the world's leading open source platforms. Full source code ownership, Thai compliance built in, and a partner that stays with you long after go-live.

What we deliver

  • Full ERP implementation — on time and on budget
  • Seamless migration from SAP, Oracle & legacy systems
  • Thai accounting, VAT & BOI compliance built in
  • Post go-live training & lifetime partnership support
OCA Certified ERPNext Partner 100% Open Source

Our Technology Partners

Services

End-to-End Open Source ERP Services

From core ERP and government-grade systems to business intelligence and process automation — every service is built on 100% open source foundations with full source code delivery and no vendor lock-in.

Enterprise Resource Planning

Unify all departments into one seamless system using Odoo or ERPNext — accounting, inventory, sales, purchasing, HR and more.

  • Thai accounting & tax compliance
  • Custom module development
  • Full source code delivery

Thai Government ERP

Purpose-built modules for public-sector organisations covering procurement, budget planning, contracts, and asset management.

  • Organizational structure management
  • Budget planning & control
  • Government procurement workflows

Digital Dashboard

Open source business intelligence powered by Frappe Insights — connect your data securely and visualize KPIs in real time.

  • Secure data connections
  • Custom charts & reports
  • Role-based access control

Process Automation & API

Integrate and automate across systems using n8n — no vendor lock-in, fully self-hosted, and endlessly extensible.

  • Cross-system workflow automation
  • REST API integrations
  • Self-hosted & open source

Frappe Solutions

Beyond ERP — CRM, HR, Learning Management, Helpdesk, Project Collaboration, and Healthcare modules from the Frappe ecosystem.

  • Frappe CRM & Helpdesk
  • HR & Payroll
  • Learning Management System

Our Approach

A Methodology Built for Long-Term Success

Our methodology is built on four pillars that ensure quality, transparency, and a lasting partnership — not just a one-off project.

01

Highest Quality Level

We work to the high standards of the Odoo Community Association (OCA), prioritising code quality and reusability in every module we build or contribute.

02

Business Expertise

Over 10 years and 40+ implementations give us deep knowledge of Thai business processes, accounting regulations, and tax compliance requirements.

03

No Vendor Lock-In

We deliver all source code at project completion so you own your system. Open source means freedom — from licensing fees and from dependency on a single vendor.

04

Long-Term Partnership

We commit to long-term relationships. Our team stays with you after go-live to ensure the system grows with your business and continues to deliver value.

Client Testimonials

Trusted by Leading Thai Organisations

From manufacturing and logistics to government agencies and space technology — our clients operate across every major sector.

"The system allows management to track production in real time. Since 2013 Ecosoft has been our trusted ERP partner."
Nantachai Siripronprasarn Raja Cycle
"Odoo replaced our SAP system in 2018. The flexibility and cost savings have been remarkable for our organisation."
Varunee Leeladhanawithaya NSTDA (Vice President)
"Moving from spreadsheets to Odoo with Ecosoft dramatically reduced errors and gave us full visibility across the business."
Somboon Thannyavun Square Panel Systems
"ERPNext is a perfect fit for us. Ecosoft's ability to customise without compromising the core system is what sets them apart."
Athip Rungkirtikul Lamphun Plastpack
"ERPNext has become our core infrastructure. It enables rapid decision-making that is critical for a space-tech startup."
Supidit Boonnawattanam EOS Orbit (CEO) — Thailand's first satellite manufacturer

Trusted by 40+ organisations across Thailand

  • ERP readiness & ROI assessment
  • Migration & implementation planning
